source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A \( 200 \, \text{V}, 50 \, \text{Hz} \), single-phase induction motor has the following connection diagram and winding orientations as shown in the <image>. MM' is the axis of the main stator winding \( M_1 M_2 \) and AA' is that of the auxiliary winding \( A_1 A_2 \). Directions of the winding axis indicate the direction of flux when currents in the windings are in the directions shown. Parameters of each winding are indicated. When switch S is closed, the motor
